theme_and_archetype.description: Clean, modern industrial/tech e-commerce aesthetic emphasizing clarity, precise technical data, and high-trust B2B transactions. Focuses on stark white backgrounds, monochrome structural elements, and a high-visibility primary color for functional actions.

usage.h1: font-cabinet-grotesk text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-black
usage.h2: font-cabinet-grotesk text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold
usage.small_labels: font-ibm-plex text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium text-gray-500
usage.sku_numbers: font-ibm-plex text-sm font-mono text-gray-800 bg-gray-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm

grid_system.marketing_home: Bento Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12) with gap-8 to gap-12 for high-impact categories.
grid_system.product_catalog: Strict Grid (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with gap-4 or gap-6.
grid_system.admin_dashboard: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with gap-4, tight packing.

alignment.headers: Left-aligned for data and technical content, centered only for pure marketing hero.

surface_strategies.header: Solid Background (#FFFFFF) with a hard bottom border (border-gray-200) for strict separation.
surface_strategies.product_cards: Grid Borders look: Flat white background, 1px subtle border (border-gray-200), zero shadow. Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-1), shadow-lg, and border darkens to border-gray-400.
surface_strategies.admin_widgets: Neumorphism (Tactile) variant: Flat gray-50 background, 1px border-black/5, subtle ambient shadow. High contrast text.
surface_strategies.modals_drawers: Solid flat background with stark borders and dark backdrop overlay (bg-black/40).

buttons.primary: bg-[#0052FF] text-white rounded-sm font-medium px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors hover:bg-[#0040CC] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0052FF] focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-gray-900 border border-gray-300 rounded-sm font-medium px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors hover:bg-gray-50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-200 focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.danger: bg-red-600 text-white rounded-sm font-medium px-6 py-2.5 hover:bg-red-700

inputs.text: border-gray-300 rounded-sm focus:border-[#0052FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0052FF] bg-white text-gray-900 placeholder:text-gray-400
inputs.search_bar: Massive top-header search. Large input (h-12 or h-14), explicit 'Search by SKU, Part Number, or Printer Model' placeholder, high-contrast Search button attached.

tables.style: Border-collapse, visible grid lines (border-b border-gray-200). Header row gets subtle bg (bg-gray-50) with uppercase tracking-wider text. Perfect for specifications and admin.

trust_badges.style: Inline SVG icons paired with small IBM Plex Sans text. Colors mapped to Status (Success/Emerald for 'In Stock', 'GST Invoice'). Bordered container (border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 p-3 flex items-center gap-3).

home_page.hero: Split layout: 60% text/search focused, 40% stark industrial image with minimal overlay.
home_page.categories: Bento grid of categories with high-contrast text and solid background colors, hover to reveal image.

product_details_page.layout: Two-column. Sticky left gallery (max-h-[80vh]). Right column dense with data: H1 Title, SKU badge, Price (MRP struck out + Selling Price + 'incl. GST' label). Pincode checker form. Add to Cart / Wishlist.
product_details_page.specifications: Full width Grid Borders table below the fold. Two columns (Key | Value) strictly left-aligned.

checkout_flow.layout: Clean, minimal interface. Strip away header navigation (leave only logo). Left column for address/pincode/payment selection. Right column for sticky Order Summary (GST explicit split).
checkout_flow.payment_options: Radio list with clear logos/text for PhonePe and Cash on Delivery.

admin_panel.layout: Sidebar navigation (dark inverse or light with gray background), top bar for breadcrumbs/user. Content area uses 'The Control Room' grid. Dense tables for bulk product management.

icons.style: Regular or Bold weight (not Duotone, to maintain industrial clarity). Use for navigation, technical specs, and trust badges.

hero_warehouse.alt: Modern laboratory featuring advanced printing equipment

category_motherboards.alt: Detailed view of electronic components on a computer motherboard

category_printers.alt: Close-up of a modern printer with a touchscreen interface

category_logistics.alt: Workers handle a package in a spacious warehouse

accessibility_and_motion.motion: Minimalist. Hover states use fast transitions (150ms). No excessive parallax. Focus on micro-interactions (button press, dropdown slide) to maintain a fast, reliable tool feel.
accessibility_and_motion.accessibility: Strict APCA/WCAG AA contrast ratios. Explicit focus rings (2px solid #0052FF with 2px offset) on all interactive elements. Support prefers-reduced-motion.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT use generic Tailwind blue/gray unless it matches the hex codes provided.
Use @phosphor-icons/react for all icons. Install via: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react
Implement the UI using raw HTML/Tailwind for marketing/storefront pages to maintain the strict border-grid look.
Use Shadcn UI for the Admin Panel and complex form elements (Select, Dialogs, Tables) but customize border radii to be rounded-sm (max 4px).
Ensure all technical data (SKUs, Part Numbers, Specs) uses the IBM Plex Sans font.
Always include GST and Pincode shipping logic in the frontend display as mock placeholders until connected to backend.
